fn f(a: A): A / {} { (a : A) }
---
f : fn(A) -> A
==========
fn f(a: A): B / {} { (a : B) }
---
ERROR: type mismatch
==========
fn f(a: A): A / {} { let x = (a : A); x }
---
f : fn(A) -> A
==========
fn f(a: A): A / {} { (a) }
---
f : fn(A) -> A
==========
data Bool { .true, .false }
fn f(b: Bool): A / {} { (b : A) }
---
ERROR: type mismatch
